message:
feat(parser): enhance DOT parser with shape mapping and default attrs

Improve DOT format bridge parity with legacy FrankenTUI:

1. Parse node shape= attribute from DOT attribute lists
   - Maps 20+ DOT shape names to NodeShape variants
   - e.g., shape=diamond → NodeShape::Diamond
   - Unmapped shapes fall back to Rect

2. Handle graph/edge/node default attribute statements
   - Previously emitted "unsupported DOT statement" warnings
   - Now silently accepted (valid DOT syntax, no runtime behavior yet)
   - Eliminates noise for standard DOT files using defaults

3. DotNode struct now carries shape alongside id and label

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
